---
description: "Plan the next smallest useful coding slice from the current requirements and checkpoint. Use when you know the general goal but need one sensible next step and one validation check."
name: "Plan Next Slice"
argument-hint: "Feature or task to move forward"
agent: "agent"
---

Read [requirements](../../docs/requirements.md) and [checkpoint](../../docs/checkpoint.md).

Then:
- restate the next smallest useful slice for the user's task
- name one validation check that should run after the change
- point out any missing requirement that should be clarified before coding
- keep the answer tight and practical
- if the next slice is not already clear from the instruction or checkpoint, deliberately explore and evaluate some options instead of trying to guess the one right answer
